name: PetroShale Inc.
summary: PetroShale Inc., an independent oil company, engages in the acquisition, development, and production of oil-weighted assets primarily in the Bakken and Three Forks formations in the Williston Basin area of North Dakota. The company holds approximately 8,218 net acres of land in Middle Bakken, Three Forks Benches, Pronghorn/Sanish, and Lodgepole. As of December 31, 2020, the company had approximately 84.7 million barrels of oil equivalent of total proved plus probable reserves. PetroShale Inc. was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Calgary, Canada.
